tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"configure terminal
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
description Connected to UbuntuComputer (192.168.1.3)
storm-control broadcast level 50.00 30.00
storm-control multicast level 50.00 30.00
storm-control unicast level 20.00 10.00
no shutdown
exit
end
write memory"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
interface Gi0/1
description Connected to UbuntuComputer (192.168.1.3)
no shutdown
exit
end
write memory"}
